Another [1998] 3 Suppl. SCR 67 : (1999) 2 SCC 77 – referred to.
State of Punjab v. Nokia India Pvt. Ltd. [2014] 11 SCR 331 : (2014) 
16 SCC 410 – clarified.

720

of Punjab & Haryana; M/s. Samsung (India) Electronics Pvt.
